name: HRA_CHECK_IN_TMPLS_B
description: This table will store UI field values for creating Check-In Template like Check-In from date, to date, status etc.

columns.Name: CHECK_IN_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of Check-In Template

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies template type of the CheckIn template.

columns.Name: WORKER_QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Questionnaire table

columns.Name: MANAGER_QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Questionnaire table

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date from which the Check-In Template is valid

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date till the Check-In Template is valid

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the Check-In Template

columns.Name: FREE_FORM_NOTES_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column is not in use.

columns.Name: PERFORMANCE_GOALS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Check-In Template can add Performance Goals

columns.Name: DEVELOPMENT_GOALS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Check-In Template can add Development Goals

columns.Name: GENERAL_DISCUSSION_TOPIC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Check-In Template can have General discussion topic

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Check-In Template can add Questionnaire

columns.Name: PERF_GOALS_AUTO_POPULATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether check-in meeting will auto populate all performance goals with in a review period if set to yes

columns.Name: DEV_GOALS_AUTO_POPULATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether check-in meeting will auto populate all development goals with in a review period if set to yes

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_IN_PERF_DOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the CheckIn Template can be displayed in performance document.

columns.Name: ALL_REVIEW_PERIODS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the Checkin Template is available to all review periods

columns.Name: ANYTIME_FEEDBACK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Check-In Template can add Anytime Feedback.

columns.Name: REQUESTED_FEEDBACK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Check-In Template can add Requested Feedback.

columns.Name: COMPETENCY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include Competencies as discussion topics.

columns.Name: DEVELOPING_SKILL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include skills the employee is developing as discussion topics.

columns.Name: DEVELOPED_SKILL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include skills the employee developed as discussion topics.

columns.Name: ALL_MANAGER_TYPES_CODE
columns.Comments: Specify all manager types that can access check-in templates.

columns.Name: MANAGER_TYPES
columns.Comments: Specify manager types that can access check-in templates.

columns.Name: WKR_QSTNR_SCORING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker questionnaire is scored.

columns.Name: WKR_CAN_VIEW_WKR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker questionnaire score can be viewed by worker.

columns.Name: WKR_CAN_VIEW_MGR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the manager questionnaire score can be viewed by worker.

columns.Name: MGR_QSTNR_SCORING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the manager questionnaire is scored.

columns.Name: MGR_CAN_VIEW_WKR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker questionnaire score can be viewed by manager.

columns.Name: MGR_CAN_VIEW_MGR_SCORES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the manager questionnaire score can be viewed by manager.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identify if the create meeting invite is enabled or not.

columns.Name: NUDGES_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to include nudges as suggestion in check-in
template.

columns.Name: OPEN_TOPICS_NO_OF_MONTHS
columns.Comments:
Stores how many months of open discussion topics to be included as
suggestion in check-in template.

columns.Name: SUGGEST_DISCUSSION_TOPICS_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to include AI generated general discussion topics as
suggestion in check-in template.

columns.Name: SUGGEST_LEARNING_ACTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to display learning actions in
check-in template.

columns.Name: SUGGEST_PERF_GOAL_ACTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to display performance goal
actions in check-in template.

columns.Name: SUGGEST_DEV_GOAL_ACTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to display development goal
actions in check-in template.

columns.Name: TOPICS_PRIOR_CHECK_INS_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to include open discussion topics
as suggestion in check-in template.

columns.Name: MANAGER_CAN_CREATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the manager can create a check-in.

columns.Name: MANAGER_CAN_UPDATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the manager can update a check-in.

columns.Name: MANAGER_CAN_CLOSE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the manager can close a check-in.

columns.Name: MANAGER_CAN_REOPEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the manager can reopen a check-in.

columns.Name: WORKER_CAN_CREATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the worker can create a check-in.

columns.Name: WORKER_CAN_UPDATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the worker can update a check-in.

columns.Name: WORKER_CAN_CLOSE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the worker can close a check-in.

columns.Name: WORKER_CAN_REOPEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the worker can reopen a check-in.

columns.Name: SUGGESTED_COMPETENCY_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to display learning actions in
check-in template.

columns.Name: MANAGER_CAN_DELETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the manager can delete a check-in.

columns.Name: WORKER_CAN_DELETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the worker can delete a check-in.

columns.Name: POSITION_PROFILE_COMP_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include position profile competency as discussion topics.

columns.Name: JOB_PROFILE_COMP_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include job profile competency as discussion topics.

columns.Name: WKR_CAN_VIEW_MGR_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the manager questionnaire can be viewed by worker.

columns.Name: MGR_CAN_VIEW_WKR_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the worker questionnaire can be viewed by manager.

columns.Name: SHOW_DONE_FOR_WKR_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to show mark as done switch for worker.

columns.Name: SHOW_DONE_FOR_MGR_QSTNR_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to show mark as done switch for manager.

columns.Name: HIDE_MGR_QSTNR_UNTIL_DONE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to hide manager questionnaire until manager marks it as done.

columns.Name: HIDE_WKR_QSTNR_UNTIL_DONE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to hide worker questionnaire until worker marks it as done.

columns.Name: WKR_QSTNR_SUBSCRIBER_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the worker questionnaire subscriber code.

columns.Name: MGR_QSTNR_SUBSCRIBER_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the manager questionnaire subscriber code.

columns.Name: SHOW_ATTACHMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to include attachments in checkins or not.

columns.Name: SUGGEST_LEARN_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to display learn items in
check-in template.

columns.Name: ALLOW_TRANSCRIPT_FLAG
columns.Comments:
Stores whether to allow transcript in
check-in template.
